rationale: a placeholder credential-shaped value is committed in a sample env file
suggested-fix: move the value to an untracked secret store and document only the variable name

rationale: a shell command is built from unsanitized input
suggested-fix: pass arguments as a list to subprocess.run without shell=True

rationale: an imported name is never used
a dependency is pinned to a yanked release
suggested-fix: upgrade the pin to a supported release

rationale: the license header copyright year is stale
a planning note references a deprecated config key
